title: SMC Box Operations and ansible-wifi Authoring
description: Operational knowledge base for SMC (Small Cell Management) boxes managed by ansible-wifi. Covers Ansible authoring, service architecture, communication flows, troubleshooting, and failure modes.
scope_boundary: In scope: ansible-wifi repo authoring, SMC box service management, live troubleshooting, Teleport access, Prometheus alerting interpretation, topology variable management. Out of scope: CNMaestro dashboard UI operations, NBN Accelerate portal, Teleport server administration.
known_constraints: SMC boxes run overlayroot — changes do not persist across reboot unless lower dir is remounted rw
Ansible connects via Teleport proxy, not direct SSH
topology_vars.py plugin output is cached in hidden .*.yml files — mtime-based, may be stale after git checkout

stable_facts.statement: SMC boxes are x86 PCs or ARM64 Raspberry Pis running Ubuntu 20.04+ (22.04 seen in production).
All remote access routes through Teleport reverse SSH tunnel. SSH port = 50000 + site_eclipse_siteid.
overlayroot is enabled: writes go to tmpfs at /media/root-rw/overlay and are lost on reboot.
Canonical topology source is inventories/*/topology_vars/<site>.yml. Hidden .*.yml files are generated cache.
